name: Sinful Spoils of the White Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Sinful Treasure of the White Forest
desc:
If you control a Fiend, Illusion, or Spellcaster monster: Activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon 1 Fiend, Illusion, or Spellcaster monster from your hand.
● Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field.
If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card.
You can only use each effect of "Sinful Spoils of the White Forest" once per turn.
eff:

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Activates if sent to the Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
